subject: Security Advisory: Python 3.11 CVE - Action Required
body:
Team,

A new CVE affecting Python 3.11 has been published. We recommend immediate action to mitigate potential security risks.

**Recommended Action:**
Upgrade Python 3.11 installations to version 3.11.8 or later.

**Impact:**
This vulnerability may affect systems running Python 3.11 versions prior to 3.11.8. Versions 3.11.8+ include critical security patches that address this issue.

**Timeline:**
Please prioritize this upgrade in your sprint planning and test thoroughly in staging environments before deploying to production.

If you have questions or need clarification on the impact to our systems, please reach out to the security team.

Thank you,
Internal Communications / Security Team
